MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT BAYER HEALTHCARE PHARMACEUTICALS INC., BAYER CORPORATION, BAYER HEALTHCARE LLC.'S MOTION TO ADMIT EDWARD DUMOULIN AS COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendants Bayer Healthcare Pharmaceuticals, Inc., Bayer Corporation and Bayer Healthcare LLC's motion to admit counsel pro hac vice, which is unopposed, is GRANTED. Counsel Edward Dumoulin may appear as counsel pro hac vice for moving parties in this action. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: E.
